title: Employment Authorization and Work Visas | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## Employment authorization and work visas
BAL’s reputation as a leader in corporate immigration is built on procuring employment authorization and work visas for our clients’ employees with compassion, expedience and accuracy.

## US nonimmigrant work visas
BAL provides expert guidance every step of the way on the full range of nonimmigrant visas that meet our clients’ business, employee and global mobility needs.
- H-1B We assist organizations with H-1B specialty occupation sponsorships by preparing petitions, managing compliance and guiding employers through regulations. LEARN MORE
We assist organizations with H-1B specialty occupation sponsorships by preparing petitions, managing compliance and guiding employers through regulations.
- H-1B1 Our legal teams facilitate and streamline the filing process for H-1B1 employment for Singaporean and Chilean professionals and help resolve portability issues. LEARN MORE
Our legal teams facilitate and streamline the filing process for H-1B1 employment for Singaporean and Chilean professionals and help resolve portability issues.
- H-2A/H-2B BAL coordinates seasonal workforce planning, recruitment compliance and filings for agricultural and non-agricultural temporary workers through the H-2A and H-2B visa programs. LEARN MORE
BAL coordinates seasonal workforce planning, recruitment compliance and filings for agricultural and non-agricultural temporary workers through the H-2A and H-2B visa programs.
- H-3 BAL handles H-3 visa filings for temporary trainees and special education exchange visitors with consistently high approval ratings. LEARN MORE
BAL handles H-3 visa filings for temporary trainees and special education exchange visitors with consistently high approval ratings.
- L-1 We handle the L-1 visa petitions for executives, managers and special-knowledge employees transferring within a company and help overcome eligibility hurdles. LEARN MORE
We handle the L-1 visa petitions for executives, managers and special-knowledge employees transferring within a company and help overcome eligibility hurdles.
- O-1 Employers trust us with securing exclusive O-1 visas for their employees with extraordinary ability in the sciences, arts, business and athletics. LEARN MORE
Employers trust us with securing exclusive O-1 visas for their employees with extraordinary ability in the sciences, arts, business and athletics.
- P Our Sports and Entertainment Group specializes in navigating the P visa process and delivering tight turnaround times for athletes, entertainers and artists. LEARN MORE
Our Sports and Entertainment Group specializes in navigating the P visa process and delivering tight turnaround times for athletes, entertainers and artists.
- TN Employers hiring Canadian and Mexican professionals through the TN visa program rely on BAL to provide policy guidance and manage the nuanced application process. LEARN MORE
Employers hiring Canadian and Mexican professionals through the TN visa program rely on BAL to provide policy guidance and manage the nuanced application process.

## US permanent residency
BAL delivers strategic guidance and end-to-end support for employment-based immigrant visas to help ensure compliance, efficiency and long-term workforce planning.
- Green card We provide step-by-step, tailored green card strategies including managing PERM programs through company restructures. LEARN MORE
We provide step-by-step, tailored green card strategies including managing PERM programs through company restructures.
- National interest waiver (NIW) Our decades of experience preparing strong NIW cases with successful outcomes for clients helps retain valuable global talent. LEARN MORE

### National interest waiver (NIW)
Our decades of experience preparing strong NIW cases with successful outcomes for clients helps retain valuable global talent.
- Trump Gold Card Our specialty practice group provides strategic counsel and elite service for applicants pursuing U.S. residency through the Trump Gold Card. LEARN MORE
Our specialty practice group provides strategic counsel and elite service for applicants pursuing U.S. residency through the Trump Gold Card.
- EB-5 visa Our expert in the Immigrant Investor Program guides foreign national investors through this unique path for lawful permanent residence. Learn More
Our expert in the Immigrant Investor Program guides foreign national investors through this unique path for lawful permanent residence.

## Worldwide coverage beyond the US
BAL facilitates seamless global mobility by managing all visa logistics and providing prompt issue resolution across international borders.
- Consular services Our extensive global network provides local insights to handle applications of all types and promptly resolve issues with accuracy and compassion. LEARN MORE
Our extensive global network provides local insights to handle applications of all types and promptly resolve issues with accuracy and compassion.
From Fortune 100 global enterprises with thousands of foreign national employees to venture-backed start-ups with a handful of immigration cases, BAL is trusted to manage the corporate immigration programs of thousands of organizations around the globe. Here’s why.

#### Award-winning technology
BAL’s proprietary case management platform simplifies and streamlines the immigration process for everyone involved, delivering real-time visibility into immigration status and clarifying the next steps to move forward.

#### The best of BAL, every time
Our collaborative oneBAL structure and unified operations allow for seamless scalability and comprehensive immigration services to protect your program through a rapidly changing immigration environment.

#### Exceptional service, without exception
With client satisfaction scores far exceeding the industry average, our dedicated account teams provide personalized support, ensuring proactive and responsive communication for both program managers and foreign nationals.

#### Innovation meets immigration
We are relentless about finding ways to improve. We work on challenging, meaningful issues and continually seek new opportunities to deliver the exceptional for our clients and consistently redefine the future of corporate immigration.

#### Leaders in corporate immigration
Focused exclusively on corporate immigration for more than 40 years, we lead the field supporting millions of people in their immigration journeys globally.
